$schema_doc: Simplified launchd config: 2 timers only. The smart orchestrator probes all 25 sources for freshness and only runs jobs when new data is detected. sync-market-data keeps its own 30min interval for real-time prices. Edit this file then run `node launchd/generate-plists.js` + `bash launchd/install.sh --reload`.

jobs.name: sync-market-data
jobs.description: BCB SGS commodity prices + macro indicators — real-time, runs alone

jobs.name: sync-orchestrator
jobs.description: Smart orchestrator — probes all 25 sources, only runs jobs with new data
jobs.comment: Daily 03:00 local — probes first, skips unchanged sources. Weekly jobs only fire on Sunday.
